description.en: Sprouted wheat and rye berries are dried and milled into flour, then built into a soft, high-hydration sandwich loaf lifted with ordinary yeast rather than sourdough. Sprouting is said to sweeten the grain and make it easier to digest than plain flour.
description.de: Gekeimte Weizen- und Roggenkörner werden getrocknet, gemahlen und zu einem weichen, feuchten Sandwichbrot verarbeitet, das mit gewöhnlicher Hefe statt Sauerteig aufgeht. Das Keimen soll das Korn süßer und leichter verdaulich machen als normales Mehl.
description.es: Los granos germinados de trigo y centeno se secan, se muelen y se convierten en un pan de molde suave y muy hidratado, leudado con levadura común en vez de masa madre. Se dice que germinar el grano lo endulza y lo hace más digerible que la harina normal.
description.fr: Des grains germés de blé et de seigle sont séchés, moulus, puis transformés en un pain de mie tendre et très hydraté, levé à la levure ordinaire plutôt qu'au levain. La germination sucrerait le grain et le rendrait plus digeste que la farine ordinaire.

origin.region: Modern American home baking, using pre-milled sprouted flour
origin.note: Builds on the older European tradition of sprouted-grain breads, but uses commercially milled sprouted flour and commercial yeast rather than a traditional sourdough culture.

ingredients.note: sprouted, dried and milled wholegrain wheat flour
sprouted, dried and milled wholegrain rye flour
optional, for a darker color, in the style of German pumpernickel

keeping.note: Sprouted-grain flour reportedly gives a moister, longer-keeping crumb, though it still stales like any yeasted loaf within a few days.

method.title: Mix
method.summary: Combine sprouted wheat and rye flours, cocoa (if using), salt, yeast and caraway seeds, then stir in water and molasses.

method.title: Rest
method.summary: Let the shaggy dough rest 5-10 minutes, then stir again about 2 minutes until smooth.

method.title: Stretch and fold
method.summary: In an oiled bowl, stretch and fold the wet dough 4-6 times instead of kneading.

method.title: First rise
method.summary: Let rise at room temperature 1-2 hours until doubled.

method.title: Shape
method.summary: Divide in two, shape into logs and settle into loaf pans.

method.title: Second rise
method.summary: Let rise 1-2 hours until the dough crowns about 2.5 cm above the pan edges.

method.title: Bake
method.summary: Bake at 175°C for 30-35 minutes until hollow-sounding when tapped.

method.title: Cool
method.summary: Cool on a rack before slicing.
